workflow.title: Workflow Editor
workflow.canvasHint: Drag nodes from left panel, connect them to build workflow

startNodes.selectDescription: A workflow needs a start node to define the entry point

userInput.title: User Input
userInput.description: Start workflow by receiving user input through chat interface

trigger.title: Trigger
trigger.description: Start workflow via API call, scheduled task, or webhook

workflow.webhookUrlDescription: Use this URL to trigger the workflow from external systems
workflow.inputParametersDescription: Parameters that can be passed to the workflow
workflow.authenticationDescription: Webhook calls require API key authentication for security and caller tracking.
workflow.authenticationRequiredDescription: All webhook calls must include a valid API key in the Authorization header. The API key owner will be recorded as the caller.
workflow.apiKeyHint: You can create and manage API keys in the Admin Panel → API Keys page.
workflow.apiKeyRequired: Enter your API key (starts with clou_)
workflow.responseFormatDescription: Understanding the API response and SSE stream events
workflow.sseStreamDescription: After triggering the workflow, connect to the stream_url to receive real-time execution events via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
workflow.webhookNote1: The workflow must be published and have webhook trigger enabled
workflow.webhookNote2: API key authentication is required - the key owner will be recorded as the caller
workflow.webhookNote3: The workflow will execute asynchronously - use the stream_url to monitor progress
workflow.responseBodyDescription: The API response will appear here
workflow.noResponseYet: No response yet. Send a request to see the response.
workflow.playgroundDescription: Test your webhook endpoint by sending requests directly from this page
workflow.successResponseDescription: When the workflow is triggered successfully
workflow.errorResponsesDescription: Possible error responses you may encounter
workflow.statusCode403: Forbidden - Invalid token, workflow not published, or webhook disabled
workflow.statusCode500: Internal Server Error - Workflow execution error
workflow.fieldCode: Response code (0 for success, non-zero for errors)
workflow.fieldRunId: Unique identifier for this workflow run
workflow.fieldStatus: Current status of the workflow run (pending, running, completed, failed)
workflow.fieldStreamUrl: Server-Sent Events endpoint to monitor workflow execution in real-time
workflow.webhookNotConfigured: Webhook is not configured for this workflow. Please generate a webhook token in the workflow settings.
workflow.noEventsYet: No events yet. Click send request to start testing

monitor_page.title: Workflow Monitor
monitor_page.successVsFailedDesc: Comparison of successful and failed runs

editor.confirmLeaveDescription: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave.

validation.variableNotAvailable: Variable "{name}" does not exist or is unavailable
validation.atLeastOneCategory: At least one category is required
validation.atLeastOneBranch: At least one condition branch is required
validation.conditionVariableNotAvailable: Condition variable "{name}" does not exist or is unavailable
validation.inputVariableRefNotExist: Input variable "{name}" references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.templateVarRefNotExist: Template variable "{name}" references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.paramRefNotExist: Parameter "{name}" references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.atLeastOneExtractParam: At least one extraction parameter is required
validation.atLeastOneAggregateVar: At least one aggregate variable is required
validation.aggregateVarRefNotExist: Aggregate variable references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.atLeastOneAssignment: At least one assignment is required
validation.assignmentRefNotExist: Assignment references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.iterateVariableEmpty: Iteration source variable cannot be empty
validation.iterateVariableNotAvailable: Iteration source variable "{name}" does not exist or is unavailable
validation.iterationNoProcessNodes: Iteration container has no processing nodes
validation.suggestLoopCondition: Suggest setting loop condition or max iterations
validation.loopNoProcessNodes: Loop container has no processing nodes
validation.inputMappingRefNotExist: Input mapping "{name}" references "{ref}" which does not exist
validation.containerNodeNoInput: Container node has no input connection

settings.title: Workflow Settings
settings.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode, cannot edit workflow settings
settings.name: Name
settings.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of the workflow...
settings.triggerManualDesc: Run manually via API or interface
settings.webhookUrlWillGenerate: Webhook URL will be generated after saving
settings.webhookPostHint: Trigger the workflow by sending a POST request to this URL
settings.cronFormatHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday
settings.versionsAutoSaved: Versions are automatically saved when publishing
settings.restoreConfirmation: Are you sure you want to restore to this version? The current version will be saved automatically and can be restored later.

runDrawer.noInputParams: This workflow has no input parameters
runDrawer.noOutputResult: Workflow completed, but no output result
runDrawer.resultPlaceholder: Output results will be displayed here after running the workflow
runDrawer.traceResultPlaceholder: Node execution trace will be displayed here after running the workflow

nodeConfig.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode, cannot edit node configuration

nodesParameterExtractor.label: Parameter Extractor
nodesParameterExtractor.methodLlmDesc: Use LLM to understand text semantics and intelligently extract parameters
nodesParameterExtractor.methodRegexDesc: Use regex to match and extract content of specific patterns
nodesParameterExtractor.methodJsonPathDesc: Extract data from JSON object or string by path

nodesVariableAggregator.label: Variable Aggregator
nodesVariableAggregator.modeObjectDesc: Aggregate multiple variables into one object { key: value }
nodesVariableAggregator.modeArrayDesc: Aggregate multiple variables into one array [item1, item2]
nodesVariableAggregator.modeConcatDesc: Concatenate multiple string variables into one string
nodesVariableAggregator.modeMergeDesc: Deep merge multiple objects into one object

nodesVariableAssignment.label: Variable Assignment
nodesVariableAssignment.opOverwriteDesc: Overwrite target variable with another variable's value
nodesVariableAssignment.opClearDesc: Clear target variable (reset to empty value)
nodesVariableAssignment.opSetDesc: Set target variable to a specified constant value
nodesVariableAssignment.opAppendDesc: Append element to array, or append key-value pair to object

configCommon.invalidVariableNameFormat: Invalid variable name format (only letters, numbers, underscores; cannot start with a number)
configCommon.duplicateVariableInNode: Variable name duplicates another variable in this node
configCommon.variableNameRules: Variable name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and cannot start with a number
configCommon.name: Name

configLlm.systemPromptPlaceholder:
Enter system prompt to define AI role and behavior...
Type '{{' to trigger variable completion
configLlm.userPromptPlaceholder:
Enter user prompt template...
Type '{{' to trigger variable completion
configLlm.enableMemoryTooltip: When enabled, context memory will be maintained in conversations
configLlm.windowSizeHint: Keep the last N rounds of conversation as context
configLlm.tokenLimitHint: Limit the maximum number of tokens in context
configLlm.noImageVariables: No image variables available. Please add "Image" or "File" type parameters in the start node.
configLlm.temperatureTooltip: Controls output randomness. Lower values make output more deterministic, higher values make it more diverse.
configLlm.topPTooltip: Nucleus sampling parameter. Controls cumulative probability threshold.
configLlm.maxOutputTokensTooltip: Limit the maximum number of tokens generated. Leave empty to use model default.
configLlm.streamingTooltip: When enabled, responses will be output word by word for a better user experience.
configLlm.outputVariablesHint: Reasoning is only returned by models supporting chain-of-thought; usage is total token count

configAgent.messageInputDesc: Message content to send to the agent

configAnswer.addStringOutputFirst: Please add a String type output variable first
configAnswer.selectStringForStreaming: Select a String type output variable for streaming
configAnswer.noOutputVariables: No output variables yet, click + to add
configAnswer.invalidOutputNameFormat: Invalid output name format (only letters, numbers, underscores; cannot start with a number)
configAnswer.outputVariableHint: Define workflow output results; upstream node variables can be selected as output

configCode.errorHandlingNoneDesc: When an exception occurs and is not handled, the node will stop running
configCode.errorHandlingDefaultDesc: When an exception occurs, specify default output content.
configCode.errorHandlingBranchDesc: When an exception occurs, the error branch will be executed
configCode.errorHandlingTooltip: Configure how to handle exceptions during code execution
configCode.defaultOutputPlaceholder: Enter default output value when an exception occurs
configCode.outputNameRequired: Output variable name cannot be empty
configCode.duplicateVariableNamesInNode: Duplicate variable names exist within this node

configCondition.elseDescription: Execute when none of the above conditions are met

configFileToUrl.autoGenerateOutputHint: Output variables will be auto-generated after adding inputs

configIteration.noIterableVariables: No iterable variables (array or object type required)
configIteration.selectIterableHint: Please select an array or object variable as the iteration object

configLoop.maxLoopHint: Prevents infinite loops; auto-exits after reaching max count
configLoop.noLoopVariables: No loop variables yet, click add button to create
configLoop.exitByMaxOnly: Exit controlled only by max loop iterations

configParameterExtractor.sourceTextHint: Select the text variable to extract parameters from

configQuestionClassifier.invalidCategoryName: Category name format invalid (only letters, numbers, underscores; cannot start with a number)
configQuestionClassifier.categoriesHint: Each category corresponds to an output branch; the model will select the best matching category based on the question content

configKnowledgeRetrieval.queryDescription: Enter the search query to retrieve relevant content from the knowledge base

api.title: API Access
api.noWebhookDescription: This workflow has not configured a webhook. Please generate a webhook token in workflow settings.
api.endpointDescription: Use this endpoint to trigger workflow execution
api.authDescription: All webhook calls must include a valid API key in the Authorization header.
api.authNote: API keys start with clou_. You can create and manage API keys in User Menu → API Keys.
api.noVariables: This workflow has no input variables
api.responseDescription: The workflow will return a response in the following format after being triggered
api.codeDescription: Response code (0 for success, non-zero for error)
api.runIdDescription: Unique identifier for the workflow run
api.statusDescription: Workflow run status (pending, running, completed, failed)
api.streamUrlDescription: SSE endpoint for real-time monitoring of workflow execution
api.sseStreamDescription: Monitor workflow execution in real-time using Server-Sent Events (SSE)
api.fromSequenceDescription: Start receiving events from this sequence number (for reconnection)
